routes.name: vault-context
routes.intent: Search vault context, answer questions, and build evidence packs

routes.name: vault-enrichment
routes.intent: Enrich notes with durable knowledge and links

routes.name: vault-structure
routes.intent: Build or repair hubs, folders, and navigation

routes.name: vault-templates
routes.intent: Create and refine reusable note templates

routes.name: vault-audit
routes.intent: Detect drift, broken links, duplicates, and stale content
